channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Canada, Mexico, and USA Advance in World Cup Tournament
item.description: The article highlights the strong performances of Canada, Mexico, and the USA in the FIFA World Cup, which is co-hosted by these three nations. Canada made history by reaching the knockout stages with...

item.title: France Advances to Quarter-Finals After Close World Cup Match Against Paraguay
item.description: France secured a hard-fought 1-0 victory over Paraguay in the World Cup 2026 last-16 clash, with Kylian Mbappe's penalty in the second half proving decisive. The match, held in Philadelphia, was marke...

item.title: Kano Distributes 90,000 Bags of Fertilizer to Support Farmers
item.description: The Kano State Government has started distributing 90,000 bags of subsidized fertilizers to farmers across 44 local government areas and 848 political wards for the 2026 wet season. Governor Abba Yusu...

item.title: Ocean City Council Approves Rezoning for Gillian's Wonderland Pier Redevelopment
item.description: Officials in Ocean City, New Jersey, have approved rezoning for the former Gillian's Wonderland Pier, a historic amusement park that closed in 2024 due to financial challenges. The site, known for its...

item.title: Alleged Influence-Buying Scheme Involving Khan and Mashazi's UK Trip

item.title: Sportsground Closures Impact Events Amid Weather Delays
item.description: The Australian Capital Territory (ACT) government has announced the closure of all sportsgrounds for training and match play due to recent heavy rainfall, which has left turf fields unsuitable for use...

item.title: Nigerian Minister Warns Mining Firms on Community Agreements and Licence Threats

item.title: Toronto Heat Alert Lifted; Weather Outlook for Upcoming Days

item.title: Minions & Monsters: A Nostalgic Tribute to Classic Hollywood Cinema

item.title: DC National Mall evacuation ordered as stormy weather disrupts July 4 celebrations
item.description: On July 4, 2026, authorities in Washington, D.C., issued an evacuation order for the National Mall due to severe weather conditions. The decision came as stormy weather threatened to disrupt the annua...

item.title: Hollywoodbets Durban July event showcases rural charm at Greyville racecourse

item.title: Trump Defies Weather Delays to Proceed with State Fair Events
item.description: President Donald Trump has vowed to proceed with the Great American State Fair in Washington, D.C., despite chaotic evacuation orders due to severe weather. The event, which includes a massive firewor...

item.title: Tinubu Reaffirms Commitment To Interfaith Dialogue And National Harmony

item.title: Sahur: Word of the Day for July 5, 2026
item.description: The article highlights the Word of the Day for July 5, 2026, which is 'sahur.' This term refers to the early morning meal traditionally consumed by Muslims during Ramadan, marking the beginning of the...

item.title: Anambra hairstylist recounts losing leg in accident and facing heartbreak
item.description: A 22-year-old Anambra hairstylist, who had recently been accepted into university, lost her leg in a tragic accident caused by a speeding bus. The incident occurred at the Oraifite Police Station, whe...

item.title: Pride in London 2026: highlights from the annual LGBTQ+ parade in pictures
